sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13588" key="a)porr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπορρ-</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ρ</itype> is regularly doubled in all compds, after <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπό;</foreign> but in Poets it sts. remains single.</entryFree>
